fields.name: SRCID
fields.description: Unique number assigned to a unique source determined through source detection on the stack (5XMM SRCIDs bear no relation to 4XMM)

fields.name: NAME
fields.description: IAU designation assigned to the unique SRCID, of the form 4XMM Jhhmmss.sSddmmss from the J2000.0 source coordinates

fields.name: RA
fields.description: Corrected right ascension (J2000) of the detection after statistical correlation with USNO B1.0, 2MASS or SDSS optical/IR catalogs (field rectification)

fields.name: DEC
fields.description: Corrected declination (J2000) of the detection after field rectification

fields.name: ERROR_RADIUS
fields.description: Total positional uncertainty, computed as sqrt(ra_err^2 + dec_err^2)

fields.name: EP_FLUX
fields.description: EPIC combined total band (0.2-12 keV) flux; mean of the band-specific detections in all cameras weighted by errors, full-PSF flux

fields.name: EP_FLUX_ERROR
fields.description: Uncertainty in the EPIC combined total band flux (error of the weighted mean over cameras)

fields.name: EP_CTS
fields.description: EPIC combined total band source counts, as derived by the SAS source detection task

fields.name: STACK_DET_ML
fields.description: Detection maximum likelihood from fitting of the 5-band spectrum; catalog processing likelihood threshold is 6

fields.name: EXTENT
fields.description: Total band extent — weighted average of the EPIC extents of all detections of the source; beta-model convolved with the PSF, point sources have extent below 6 arcsec or extent likelihood below 4 (reliable up to 80 arcsec)

fields.name: EXTENT_ERROR
fields.description: 1-sigma symmetric uncertainty in the total band extent as determined by the SAS task emldetect

fields.name: VAR_FLAG
fields.description: Set to True if the source was detected as variable (chi-squared probability test) within a single observation

fields.name: SUM_FLAG
fields.description: Summary flag — integer representation of the stacked source quality flags (0 = clean; higher values indicate possible issues or spurious detection)

fields.name: N_OBS
fields.description: Total number of observations per stack; null in observation-specific rows, so N_OBS > 0 selects the summary source rows

fields.name: N_CONTRIB
fields.description: Number of contributing observations for which the source position is inside the field of view
